---
title: "What We Offer"
format: html
---


<div class="container mt-4">

  <div class="row">

    <!-- Geospatial Consulting -->
    <div class="col-md-6 mb-4">
      <a href="geospatial-consulting.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
        <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
          <img src="icons/icon1.jpg" class="card-img-top p-4" style="width: 150px; margin: auto;">
          <div class="card-body text-center">
            <h4 class="card-title">Geospatial Consulting</h4>
            <p class="card-text">Expert support for spatial analysis, mapping, and geospatial workflows.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- Data Cleaning & Preprocessing -->
    <div class="col-md-6 mb-4">
      <a href="data-cleaning.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
        <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
          <img src="icons/icon2.jpg" class="card-img-top p-4" style="width: 150px; margin: auto;">
          <div class="card-body text-center">
            <h4 class="card-title">Data Cleaning & Preprocessing</h4>
            <p class="card-text">Reliable data preparation, transformation, and quality assurance.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="row">

    <!-- Professional Training & Capacity Building -->
    <div class="col-md-6 mb-4">
      <a href="training-capacity-building.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
        <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
          <img src="icons/icon3.jpg" class="card-img-top p-4" style="width: 150px; margin: auto;">
          <div class="card-body text-center">
            <h4 class="card-title">Professional Training & Capacity Building</h4>
            <p class="card-text">Workshops, courses, and hands‑on training to strengthen technical skills.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- Analytical Support -->
    <div class="col-md-6 mb-4">
      <a href="analytical-support.qmd" class="text-decoration-none text-dark">
        <div class="card h-100 shadow-sm">
          <img src="icons/icon4.jpg" class="card-img-top p-4" style="width: 150px; margin: auto;">
          <div class="card-body text-center">
            <h4 class="card-title">Analytical Support</h4>
            <p class="card-text">Custom analysis, modeling, and decision‑support services.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>

  </div>

</div>


<style>
.card {
  transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}
.card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-6px);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);
}
</style>
